questions.question: Explain the role of the system bus in computer organization.
expectedPoints: Transfers data, addresses, and control signals
Types: data bus, address bus, control bus

questions.question: Describe the memory hierarchy in computer systems and explain why such an arrangement is necessary.
expectedPoints: Pyramid structure from fast/expensive to slow/inexpensive
Includes registers, cache, RAM, secondary storage
Balances speed, cost, and capacity requirements
Uses principle of locality (temporal and spatial)
Cache improves performance by storing frequently accessed data
Virtual memory extends RAM using secondary storage
